response_text:
ENTITY Person
PK person_id
ATTR person_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ENTITY Crew
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar
ATTR person_id : varchar : FK
REL Crew -> Person : 1 -> 1 : FK=person_id
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar
ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar : FK
REL Airport -> City : 0..N -> 1 : FK=city_id
ENTITY AircraftModel
PK model_id
ATTR model_id : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar
ENTITY Aircraft
PK registration_id
ATTR registration_id : varchar : PK
ATTR model_id : varchar : FK
REL Aircraft -> AircraftModel : 0..N -> 1 : FK=model_id
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR aircraft_registration_id : varchar : FK
REL Flight -> Airline : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 0..N -> 1 : FK=aircraft_registration_id
ENTITY FlightCrew
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
REL FlightCrew -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrew -> Crew : 0..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status_description : varchar
ATTR scheduled_date : date
ATTR scheduled_time : time
ATTR person_id : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
REL Passenger -> Person : 1 -> 1 : FK=person_id
REL Passenger -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
